title: create_category bumps Category state_seq on INSERT OR IGNORE no-op
description: store::create_category uses INSERT OR IGNORE which silently ignores duplicate category ids. The bump_state_seq call that follows is unconditional, so a duplicate create call increments the Category state token even though nothing changed. Same pattern as nie-14sh.44 (create_channel) and nie-kef6.24 (create_space).
